rules.name: Verification Required Before Ship

rules.name: Test-First Discipline
rules.description: Source file edits require corresponding test file with failing assertion

rules.name: Scope Guard
rules.description: Edits must stay within scope defined in goal artifact or plan

action.message: Edit may be outside approved scope
questions: Is this edit within the approved goal scope?
